## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated

- [ ] `ruff check` and `mypy` pass
- [ ] Docs updated if the DSL or templates changed (`docs/DSL.md`, `docs/TEMPLATES.md`, `README.md`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under "Unreleased"
